summary: For a 13-month-old unimmunized child, ensure administration includes DTaP-IPV/Hib/hepB (combined vaccine), MMR, and Poliovirus vaccines as per updated CDC guidelines; also consider administering Bacillus Calmette-Guérin (BCG). This regimen covers essential diseases effectively while adhering strictly to recommended protocols. Given these comprehensive protections tailored specifically towards preventing critical childhood infections, no further adjustments appear warranted based upon available information. To confirm accuracy, cross-referencing local jurisdiction-specific variations remains advisable but is beyond immediate scope due solely to query constraints regarding national standards application herein discussed thoroughly already.
